era_context: Early Bronze Age III; Egyptian Old Kingdom Fourth Dynasty; Mesopotamian Early Dynastic Period III; Indus Valley Civilization mature phase.

historiographic_note: The year 2963 BCE falls within the Early Bronze Age III, a period for which no contemporary written records provide year-by-year documentation. The historical record for this era is constructed entirely from archaeological evidence and later compilations. No events can be reliably assigned to this specific year.
